my_thoughts: Start with the leaky-jar image to make 'endless indulging' feel like punishment. Expect initial pushback; if they defend, sharpen the cost (never filled, constant labor) to crack pleasure=good.
accumulated_insight: T1: Student endorses 'life of indulged desires' as best?cooperative engagement via asserts_value. They understand: pleasure = good. The constraint_collapse/UM_03 move sets an extreme case (leaky-jar life) to expose endless toil. Pattern: bold hedonist claim ? consequence test queued. Medium confidence because hedonist theses often resist until the toil is vivid.
visible_response: And is this life admirable because it is pleasant, or for some other reason?
